creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: How is the libcec update coming along?  The security issue impacted kodi-14.2's embedded ffmpeg (http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/80c66af0-d1c5-449e-bd31-63b12525ff88.html) seems like it would a low risk for a system playing local media on an isolated home LAN.  Is the CEC option something that most users would expect to use?
